creator: np@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried a a couple of different 1G optics in a T540 in a system running head and they both worked just fine.  I do not have any 1G CWDM optics so I could not try that.

11.2 is no longer supported and I'm closing this as unable to reproduce.  Please reopen if you still have this problem with a recent release.
